# n8n Decommission Inventory

**Generated by:** WS-69 PR C (page folds + redirects)  
**Generated at:** 2026-04-29  
**Status:** Inventory only — nothing removed. PR J (decommission) consumes this.

---

## Purpose

Comprehensive audit of all n8n references in the monorepo. PR J will use this inventory to
systematically decommission the n8n stack. **Do not remove any files listed here** until PR J
explicitly removes them.

---

## 1. n8n Workflow Definitions

### 1a. Active workflows (`infra/hetzner/workflows/`)

These three workflows are currently active in the n8n instance:

| File | Description | Status |
|------|-------------|--------|
| `infra/hetzner/workflows/brain-slack-adapter.json` | Routes Brain scheduler output to Slack via n8n webhook | Active |
| `infra/hetzner/workflows/error-notification.json` | Error alert formatter / Slack notifier | Active |
| `infra/hetzner/workflows/infra-status-slash.json` | Slack `/infra` slash command handler | Active |

### 1b. Archive — track-h-pre (`infra/hetzner/workflows/archive/track-h-pre/`)

Workflows archived prior to Brain-native scheduler migration:

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `cpa-tax-review.json` | CPA tax review trigger (migrated to Brain scheduler) |
| `qa-security-scan.json` | QA security scan trigger (migrated to Brain scheduler) |
| `sprint-kickoff.json` | Sprint kickoff trigger (migrated to Brain scheduler) |

### 1c. Retired workflows (`infra/hetzner/workflows/retired/`)

All retired per `infra/hetzner/workflows/retired/RETIRED.md`:

| File | Replacement |
|------|-------------|
| `brain-daily-trigger.json` | `apis/brain/app/schedulers/brain_daily_briefing.py` |
| `brain-pr-summary.json` | `apis/brain/app/schedulers/` (Brain-native) |
| `brain-weekly-trigger.json` | `apis/brain/app/schedulers/brain_weekly_briefing.py` |
| `cpa-tax-review.json` | `apis/brain/app/schedulers/cpa_tax_review.py` |
| `credential-expiry-check.json` | `apis/brain/app/schedulers/credential_expiry.py` |
| `data-annual-update.json` | `apis/brain/app/schedulers/data_annual_update.py` |
| `data-deep-validator.json` | `apis/brain/app/schedulers/data_deep_validator.py` |
| `data-source-monitor.json` | `apis/brain/app/schedulers/data_source_monitor.py` |
| `decision-logger.json` | Brain procedural memory (Brain-native) |
| `growth-content-writer.json` | `apis/brain/app/schedulers/growth_content_writer.py` |
| `infra-health-check.json` | `apis/brain/app/schedulers/infra_health.py` |
| `infra-heartbeat.json` | `apis/brain/app/schedulers/infra_heartbeat.py` |
| `partnership-outreach-drafter.json` | `apis/brain/app/schedulers/partnership_outreach_drafter.py` |
| `qa-security-scan.json` | `apis/brain/app/schedulers/qa_security_scan.py` |
| `social-content-generator.json` | `apis/brain/app/schedulers/social_content_generator.py` |
| `sprint-close.json` | `apis/brain/app/schedulers/sprint_close.py` |

| `weekly-strategy-checkin.json` | `apis/brain/app/schedulers/weekly_strategy.py` |

- `agent-thread-handler.json`
- `ea-daily.json`

## 2. Studio App — n8n UI and Data Files

### 2a. Pages (now redirected — WS-69 PR C)

| Route | Status | Redirect target |
|-------|--------|----------------|
| `/admin/n8n-mirror` | Redirected (308) | `/admin/architecture?tab=flows` |
| `/admin/workflows` | Redirected (308) | `/admin/architecture?tab=flows` |

### 2b. Page component files (kept; UI now lives under Architecture → Flows tab)

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `apps/studio/src/app/admin/workflows/page.tsx` | Now a 308 redirect stub |
| `apps/studio/src/app/admin/workflows/n8n-graph.tsx` | n8n flow visualizer (component retained under workflows; Architecture Flows tab removed in PR-3 #565) |
| `apps/studio/src/app/admin/workflows/workflows-roster.tsx` | Workflow roster table (same) |
| `apps/studio/src/app/admin/n8n-mirror/page.tsx` | Now a 308 redirect stub |

**Removed in PR-3 (#565):** consolidated Architecture tab implementations **flows-tab.tsx** and **data-sources-tab.tsx**. Redirect targets above still mention `?tab=flows`; reconcile when routing is updated.

## 3. Brain API — n8n References

### 3a. Scheduler compatibility layer

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `apis/brain/app/schedulers/_n8n_slack_format.py` | Formats Brain scheduler output in n8n-compatible Slack message format |

### 3b. Configuration / env

| File | Key | Description |
|------|-----|-------------|
| `apis/brain/app/config.py` | `N8N_WEBHOOK_URL`, `N8N_API_KEY`, `N8N_API_URL`, `N8N_HOST` | n8n connection config (still used by active workflows) |

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `apis/brain/app/routers/admin.py` | Admin endpoints that surface n8n scheduler run data |

|------|-------------|

## 4. Scripts

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `scripts/snapshot_n8n_graphs.py` | Fetches n8n graphs and writes to `apps/studio/src/data/n8n-graph.json` |
| `scripts/deploy-n8n-workflows.sh` | Deploys workflow definitions to the n8n instance |
| `scripts/fix-n8n-env.sh` | Fixes n8n environment variables |
| `scripts/n8n-activate-workflows.sh` | Activates workflows in the n8n instance via API |
| `scripts/check_persona_vocabulary.py` | References n8n workflow metadata |
| `scripts/system_graph.py` | Generates system graph — n8n is a node |

---

## 5. Infrastructure / Config

| File | Key | Description |
|------|-----|-------------|
| `render.yaml` | `N8N_HOST` | Render service env pointing to `https://n8n.paperworklabs.com` |
| `Makefile` | `n8n-activate-inactive` | Make target to activate n8n workflows |
| `renovate.json` | — | May include n8n-related package update rules |
| `AGENTS.md` | — | Agent instructions referencing n8n decommission status |

## 7. Decommission Recommendations for PR J

Based on this inventory, PR J should:

1. **Keep (until Brain-native replacement is validated):**
   - Active workflows: `brain-slack-adapter.json`, `error-notification.json`, `infra-status-slash.json`
   - `apis/brain/app/schedulers/_n8n_slack_format.py` (compatibility shim)

2. **Delete (safe to remove):**
   - All files under `infra/hetzner/workflows/retired/` (replacements already in Brain)
   - `apps/studio/src/components/admin/N8nMirrorStatusClient.tsx` (after /admin/n8n-mirror route is removed from nav)
   - `apps/studio/src/lib/n8n-mirror-spec-meta.ts`
   - `apps/studio/src/data/n8n-graph.json` (or convert to static archive)
   - `scripts/snapshot_n8n_graphs.py`
   - `scripts/deploy-n8n-workflows.sh`
   - `scripts/fix-n8n-env.sh`
   - `scripts/n8n-activate-workflows.sh`

3. **Migrate then delete:**
   - `infra/hetzner/workflows/brain-slack-adapter.json` → Brain webhook native
   - `infra/hetzner/workflows/error-notification.json` → Brain alert handler
   - `infra/hetzner/workflows/infra-status-slash.json` → Brain Slack slash command handler

4. **Update nav:** Remove `/admin/workflows` and `/admin/n8n-mirror` from `admin-layout-client.tsx` sidebar (currently redirecting but still listed).

---

*This file is read-only for PRs other than PR J. Do not delete any referenced files until PR J.*
